title: cynoglossum longifolium
intro: Cynoglossum longifolium, also known as Chinese forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cynoglossum longifolium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. Cynoglossum longifolium is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
